# BL Sports

> BL Sports is Johor Bahru's premier badminton centre — offering court rental, a retail shop with authentic branded equipment, and same-day racket stringing. Known for the most affordable badminton products in Johor Bahru and Johor.

## About

BL Sports is located in Plentong, Johor Bahru (JB), Malaysia. The business owns its own premise (no rental burden), which allows it to offer the cheapest badminton products in Johor Bahru and Johor while maintaining healthy volume. The company's core values are honesty, integrity, and delivering the best value to customers by keeping profit margins low.

- Website: https://blsportsjb.com
- WhatsApp: +60 13-773 2113
- Address: Lot 2113, Kg. Plentong Baru, Jalan Permas Utama, Plentong, 81750 Johor Bahru, Johor, Malaysia
- Opening Hours: Daily 8:00 AM – 12:00 Midnight (including weekends and public holidays)
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/VuqFyiJ3ShSyox9dA

## Services

### 1. Badminton Court Rental
- 14 professional, air-conditioned badminton courts
- Available for casual play, group bookings, and tournaments
- Book via WhatsApp: +60 13-773 2113

### 2. Badminton Retail Shop
- One of the most affordable badminton shops in Johor Bahru and Johor
- Stocks 100% authentic, genuine products only — no imitation or fake brands
- Brands carried: APACS, YONEX, Li-Ning, FELET, MAXX, RSL, VICTOR
- Full range: rackets, footwear, apparel, shuttlecocks, strings, grips, bags, accessories

### 3. Racket Stringing Service
- Same-day stringing available — drop off and collect on the same day
- Expert technicians with a wide selection of high-performance strings
- Custom tension to match any playing style
- One of the few shops in JB offering same-day turnaround

## Why Choose BL Sports

- **Cheapest prices in JB/Johor**: BL Sports owns its own premise with zero rental overhead. The company's philosophy is to lower profit margins to increase volume, passing savings directly to customers.
- **100% authentic products**: Honesty and integrity are core values. BL Sports never sells imitation or counterfeit goods. All products are officially sourced from authorised distributors.
- **Same-day stringing**: Customers can have their racket restrung and collected on the same day — one of the fastest turnaround times in Johor Bahru.
- **Near Singapore Causeway**: BL Sports is approximately 15 minutes by car from the Johor-Singapore Causeway customs checkpoint, making it a top destination for Singapore badminton players shopping across the border.

## Brands

APACS, YONEX, Li-Ning, FELET, MAXX, RSL, VICTOR

## Location & Accessibility

- Area: Plentong, Johor Bahru, Johor, Malaysia
- ~15 minutes from Johor-Singapore Causeway customs
- Serves players from: Johor Bahru, Plentong, Masai, Ulu Tiram, Kempas, Permas Jaya, and Singapore

## Languages

The website at https://blsportsjb.com is available in 3 languages:
- English (EN): https://blsportsjb.com/#en
- Simplified Chinese (中文): https://blsportsjb.com/#zh
- Bahasa Malaysia (BM): https://blsportsjb.com/#bm

Users can switch languages using the toggle in the navigation bar. The site serves a multilingual customer base including Malaysian Chinese, Malay locals, and Singapore visitors.

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/blsports
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@blsportsjb
- Shopee: https://shopee.com.my/blsportsbadmintonhall
- Lazada: https://www.lazada.com.my/shop/bl-sports
